summary:
The available evidence shows no link between Amgen and the development of Stelara (ustekinumab). Clinical details focus solely on treatment uses and mechanisms rather than developmental origin; thus, based on absence of data supporting Amgen’s role, it can be concluded that Stelara was not developed by them. 

The summary must contain only two sentences:

Stelara (ustekinumab) was not developed by Amgen, according to the retrieval results which show no attribution to Amgen despite detailed coverage of its use in conditions like psoriasis and Crohn’s disease.  
Clinical literature describes its application across autoimmune disorders without mentioning developers such as Amgen or MedImmune/AstraZeneca—confirming lack of association with Amgen.
